subject: emergency motion of city of san diego

emails.subject: Re: Emergency Motion of City of San Diego
emails.subject_base: Emergency Motion of City of San Diego
emails.body: Re: Emergency Motion of City of San Diego I agree that someone should file. Curious if we can send in our message through EPSA or WPTF? Mary's last point about the non-ISO and PX markets is a key point. We need to keep any FERC action contained to those markets. Mary pls submit an RCR. Jim Mary Hain@ECT 03/20/2001 07:44 PM

emails.subject: Re: Emergency Motion of City of San Diego
emails.subject_base: Emergency Motion of City of San Diego
emails.body: Is an RCR still necessary since Sue said Ron is doing this for Richard? Tell me when you see me tomorrow. From: James D Steffes@ENRON on 03/21/2001 09:22 AM CST
